summary: ANDROID 🟥 | CCL | CCL during call is blinking for blocking settings
scenario: CCL (Call Control Layer) settings blink instead of being locked during an active call
description_clean: During a call, the CCL (Call Control Layer) settings are blinking instead of being locked/blocked as expected. Steps: Go to CCL and start a call. Observed: CCL settings blink. Expected: CCL settings are locked.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure your Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Locate the Call Control Layer (CCL) settings within the device settings.
5. Initiate a call (e.g., make or receive a phone call via the connected device).
6. While the call is active, observe the behavior of the CCL settings in the app.
expected: The CCL settings should be locked/blocked and not interactive during an active call.
actual: The CCL settings are blinking instead of being locked/blocked during an active call.
